sentences.arabic: يَحْتَفِلُ المُسْلِمُونَ بِعِيدِ الفِطْرِ بَعْدَ انْتِهَاءِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ.
sentences.translation: Muslimani slave Ramazanski bajram nakon završetka mjeseca ramazana.
sentences.translationEn: Muslims celebrate Eid al-Fitr after the end of the month of Ramadan.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَيْقِظُ النَّاسُ بَاكِرًا لِأَدَاءِ صَلَاةِ العِيدِ فِي المَسْجِدِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi se bude rano kako bi klanjali bajram-namaz u džamiji.
sentences.translationEn: People wake up early to perform the Eid prayer in the mosque.

sentences.arabic: يَرْتَدِي الأَطْفَالُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً وَيَحْصُلُونَ عَلَى العَيْدِيَّةِ مِنَ الكِبَارِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca nose novu odjeću i dobijaju bajramluk od odraslih.
sentences.translationEn: Children wear new clothes and receive 'Eidiya' (money gifts) from adults.

sentences.arabic: تَصْنَعُ النِّسَاءُ حَلْوَيَاتٍ خَاصَّةً مِثْلَ المَعْمُولِ وَالكَعْكِ.
sentences.translation: Žene prave posebne slatkiše poput maamula i kolača.
sentences.translationEn: Women make special sweets such as maamoul and cookies.

sentences.arabic: يَتَبَادَلُ الأَقَارِبُ الزِّيَارَاتِ وَالتَّهَانِيَ فِي جَوٍّ مِنَ الفَرَحِ.
sentences.translation: Rođaci razmjenjuju posjete i čestitke u atmosferi radosti.
sentences.translationEn: Relatives exchange visits and congratulations in an atmosphere of joy.
